items.title: British Pound extends losses nearing 1.3400 as markets await Burnham’s policies

items.title: Oil: Geopolitical premium persists as Gulf conflict escalates – BNY
items.summary: BNY’s Geoff Yu notes that the U.S.–Iran confrontation and Houthi threats in the Red Sea are sustaining a geopolitical premium in Brent and WTI. Brent has risen toward $88 per barrel, with risks that Strait of Hormuz disr
